reason: class-validator decorators (@IsString, @IsEmail, @Matches, etc.) have metadata-driven branch execution that is not testable via unit tests. Branch coverage 38.09% is architectural limitation, not code quality issue. These decorators execute through reflection/metadata at runtime, not through normal control flow paths.

action: Added 4 new tests to vin-decoder (unmapped variables, NaN parsing, empty values, full mapping) and 6 tests to vehicle.controller (query param branches). Total 10 new tests.
result: No improvement: architectural ceilings dominate overall metric
